productName: Nano Doozies - Strawberry Lime 3:1 ELEVATE 10 Pk (80g) (300mg CBC;100mg THC)
description: A mouth-watering tart, crisp lime infused treat with candy-kitchen charm and a smooth cannabis experience tucked into every serving. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBC to round out the full-plant entourage effect in a 3:1 ratio. For an uplifting, energetic experience.
